title: Bear's Building Blocks
description: Bear's Building Blocks adds blocks that are great for building.
body:
# ![Bear's Building Blocks Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e3ee71373b05d25b76d133622309c9fd27fb21c.png)
# CURRENTLY UNDERGOING A BIG UPDATE MOST NEW VERSIONS WILL HAVE MISSING RECIPES SO ALPHA RELEASES ARE NOT RECOMMENDED FOR SURVIVAL, Use version 2.0.0

Bear's Building Blocks is a mod that adds new Vanilla style blocks to the game.
The mod gets frequently updated with new blocks.

What's in the mod?
---------------------------------------
New stairs and slabs for these blocks:

Smooth basalt
Tuff
Calsite
Dripstone 
Netherrack
End Stone
Smooth stone (only stairs because slabs already exist)

----------------------------------------
Chiseled versions for these blocks:

End Stone
Mud Bricks
Bricks
Prismarine

----------------------------------------
Tiles for these blocks:

Stone
End Stone
Quartz
Brick
Mud
Prismarine
Nether Brick

----------------------------------------
Walls for these blocks:

Polished Diorite
Polished Granite
Polished Andisite

----------------------------------------
Wood Walls for every wood type:

Oak
Spruce
Birch
Jungle
Dark Oak
Acacia
Mangrove
Crimson
Warped

----------------------------------------
Mossy Logs and Mossy Dirt:

Mossy Oak
Mossy Spruce
Mossy Birch
Mossy Jungle
Mossy Dark Oak
Mossy Acacia
Mossy Mangrove

Mossy Dirt
Mossy Coarse Dirt
Mossy Rooted Dirt
Mossy Gravel
Mossy Mud

----------------------------------------
Wooden Baracades for all wood types, Iron and Gold:

Oak
Spruce
Birch
Jungle
Dark Oak
Acacia
Mangrove
Crimson
Warped
Iron
Gold

----------------------------------------
Missing Metal type Blocks:

Gold Button
Iron Button
Gold Trapdoor
Gold Door
Gold Bars

----------------------------------------
Cut Crops (alternate versions of crops that can be place on other blocks than only framland):

Wheat
Carrots
Potatoes
Beetroot
Netherwart

----------------------------------------
Other blocks:

Empty Bookshelf
Warped Flower
Crimson Flower
Block of Cake
